events.summary: A setup recommendation or PR touches MCP, plugin, hook, command, agent, rule, or adapter surfaces. The evaluator records the surface without editing local or user-level config.
Retrieved the adapter state, install/onramp path, verification commands, risk notes, and config-preservation tests for the affected harness.
Generated two candidate playbooks: adapter-matrix-backed drift check, and unsupported hook parity claim that copies Claude semantics into every harness.
Accepted the matrix-backed drift check because it names state, install path, verification, and preservation behavior. Rejected unsupported hook parity because it overclaims portability.
Promoted only the read-only harness-config quality playbook. The evaluator does not overwrite configs, toggle MCP servers, publish plugins, or claim native support.
